osm/way/34770750.summary: Enterprise data center operated by Hewlett-Packard / HPE for its own corporate and cloud operations rather than for lease.

osm/way/819981891.summary: Captive enterprise data center for HCA Healthcare's IT & Services division, supporting hospital and clinical systems — general compute, not for lease.

osm/way/1344901566.summary: Wholesale colocation facility operated by Sentinel Data Centers, leasing space and power to multiple enterprise tenants.

osm/way/204316962.summary: Multi-tenant colocation facility in Edison, NJ originally developed by IO Data Centers (since absorbed into Iron Mountain's portfolio).

osm/way/723117951.summary: STACK Infrastructure hyperscale-colocation campus in New Albany, Ohio — one of the anchors of central Ohio's fast-growing data center corridor.

osm/way/460167190.summary: Wholesale colocation facility under the Intergate brand (Sabey lineage), built for multiple large tenants.

osm/way/876120402.summary: Colocation facility developed by DBT Data in Harrisonburg, VA, serving regional enterprise and tenant demand.

osm/way/1501825871.summary: Appears to be a high-density / cryptocurrency-mining site in Chateaugay, NY — part of a known upstate New York mining cluster drawing on cheap power.
